description: Push notification service powered by ntfy. Publish messages from any script, CI pipeline, or application using simple HTTP POST requests — receive them instantly on your phone (iOS/Android), desktop, or via streaming API. Each enrollment gets a unique private topic with support for message priorities, emoji tags, click actions, scheduled delivery, and attachments. No client library required; any tool that can make HTTP requests (cURL, Python requests, fetch) works out of the box.
name: ntfy-notifications

ntfy-upstream.description: Private ntfy instance - no authentication required
